sentences.arabic: الْخَطُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنٌّ قَدِيمٌ يَتَعَلَّمُهُ النَّاسُ مُنْذُ الصِّغَرِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija je stara umjetnost koja se uči od djetinjstva.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is an ancient art that people learn from childhood.

sentences.arabic: تُكْتَبُ الأَحْرُفُ بِقَلَمِ الرِّيشَةِ أَوِ الْقَلَمِ الرَّفِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Slova se pišu perom od trske ili tankim pisaljkama.
sentences.translationEn: Letters are written with a reed pen or a fine stylus.

sentences.arabic: يُوجَدُ أَنْوَاعٌ كَثِيرَةٌ مِنَ الْخُطُوطِ مِثْلَ الثُّلُثِ وَالنَّسْخِ وَالْكُوفِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Postoje mnoge vrste pisma kao što su thuluth, naskh i kufic.
sentences.translationEn: There are many types of scripts such as thuluth, naskh, and kufic.

sentences.arabic: تُزَيَّنُ الْمَسَاجِدُ وَالْقُصُورُ بِالْخَطِّ الْعَرَبِيِّ الرَّائِعِ.
sentences.translation: Džamije i palače se ukrašavaju prekrasnom arapskom kaligrafijom.
sentences.translationEn: Mosques and palaces are decorated with magnificent Arabic calligraphy.

sentences.arabic: الْخَطُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنٌّ وَدِيِنٌ وَهُوِيَّةٌ فِي آنٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija je istovremeno umjetnost, vjera i identitet.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is at once art, religion, and identity.
